reviews.review_text:
This Caravan Park is so much better now that the previous Managers Kristy and Steve have left.  They treated patrons terribly and were dishonest.
The new park managers are lovely, the facilities are looking great and its refreshing to receive a smile.

Home away from home . A great caravan park with excellent facilities. Our boys loved looking for Howie the lost pelican thru out the park hidden each day bye Michelle and Mark who are the best . The dog excercise area is great . Looking forward to improvements in the future . The camp kitchen is great and serves everyone who uses it in a central location of the park . Toilet shower blocks are super clean . Hats off to everyone who works at the caravan park
Thanks Michelle for helping us out at the last minute   just before Easter with a cabin.. excellent amenities,  great vibe and friendly staff  👌
Excellent spot! Great pub nearby!
Deluxe cabin was roomy with an amazing view! Bike trails excellent!
Great value caravan park. Very friendly staff. Excellent amenities.
Excellent park people are really friendly staff are great 👍

We stayed at Coobowie Caravan Park in the School house and it was very comfortable. The bathroom and kitchen had new fixtures and were so clean and easy to use. The back area with BBQ was great for games with the family and bbq and watching the footy etc., Went ocean swimming at Edithburg tidal pool each day and had a retreat of sorts. Families or friends in groups could benefit from the numerous bunks in the schoolhouse.

Would have been 5 stars rated but the place we got was powered and watered but no gray water collection point.
Amenities are clean, playground for kids is good, overall this caravan park is good.
We enjoyed our relaxing stay in the huge unpowered area. Amenities are great and super friendly staff,
Love it at coobowie
Fabulous location and the park is fabulous. We stayed in a cabin which was lovely and clean. Will definitely go again.

We spent the January long weekend at Coobowie caravan park. Great location, nice clean park. Great sized sites. The ammenities were always very clean. Staff were lovely.
A highlight would be the dog park they have built. A safe area for the dogs to play!!

Excellent little caravan park on Yorkes.  Quiet despite being mostly full.  Hot showers and good water pressure.  Staff were excellent helping to source a hose adapter and resolve a leaking diesel tank for the van's diesel heater.

A hidden gem as far as a peaceful caravan park. Stayed in the School House - bunk beds comfortable and clean with 4 rooms of bunk beds including several bunks that had the double bed on the bottom so great for families or friends. 3 toilets/showers that served us well. All facilities very clean and adequate for stay. Under cover built in area had lots of room - barbque and 3 wooden picnic benches/tables as well as lounge chair, Kitchen had 2 lounges and double doors opened onto the undercover bbq area. Airconditioning into the bedrooms great and also in the kitchen. Quite hot when we were there and found that the built in undercover  area very warm even  when double doors left open with kitchen air conditioner running as there is no air conditioning in this area. It does have large all round windows and as there is a great breeze that comes from the beachfront we would have loved to have had a screen door on the front door so we could open the door and take advantage of it allowing it to flow through to the undercover area if doors all left open when air conditioners not running.  The staff at the park are  friendly and approachable and answered all needs. Had a food van at the park on Friday night which is definitely a go to. Office stocks icecream also.  Very little noise throughout the park and we were there in school holidays - ?? due to people being put off due to reports of the algal bloom which  was a pity. Park has a great playground and Coobowie  also has one as you enter the town from Adelaide. It is a very short drive to Stansbury and Edithburgh and well placed between the two, Definitely a place to revisit  when we have the  time and is great value for money. Hoping others will head down there and give the community some input. Only thing we didnt do was visit the Coobowie Pub for a meal - werent aware they were open for dining but found pout they open from Tuesdays to Sundays and is well within walking distance from the park. Would have eaten there if we knew earlier.
Beautiful experience starting at Coobowie caravan park. Park managers Mark and Michelle is so accommodating.|Cabin is nice and clean. We'd love to come back in the future

Powered site booked over the phone easy as . This is the 4 time here at this caravan pk . The new park managers are super and nothing is to much trouble ❤️ . Changes noted at the park are for the better. Good to see children using the playground too . Our 3 boys just love this caravan park for riding bikes and exploring . Finding Howie the pelican in hidden places round the park is such a great idea and the reward to the children is just the best . Mark and Michelle you are such kind people and thank you for accommodating our family . Cheers from the McKay family .

Our family stayed for 4 nights in peak summer season. The sites were roomy and grassy with ocean views. Staff were really friendly and helpful offering fishing tips. You can borrow equipment to play tennis and bocce.
Coobowie is a great location to base yourself if you prefer a less-crowded vibe. Edithburgh was a quick bike ride or drive away for good fishing and swimming spots.
We highly recommend this place!

We checked in for one night and stayed at an unpowered campsite. The caravan park is great! The kitchen, laundry and bathrooms were all awesome, impeccably clean and well kept. Would definitely stay again !
Honestly one of the best run caravan parks we have been to. Staff are sensational. The town is fabulous and well worth a stay and visit.

Just a great place to stay. We love the pet friendly cabins so we can take our dogs with us. Great fishing off numerous jetties nearby. Friendly hosts and a great location. Great food at the pub as well.

My family and I stayed here as part of the Coast is Calling Voucher Scheme.

I had not even heard of Coobowie but thought the photos looked nice.

My goodness, the photos do not do it justice!  We stayed in a deluxe cabin on the beachfront and were blown away!  The accommodation was clean and comfortable with a big beautiful spa in the bathroom.  The deck overlooking the ocean was our favourite spot to enjoy our holiday.

Whilst we had limited contact with staff, they were lovely when we dealt with them.

Could not recommend this park enough!
Clean. Well maintained.  Good price. Modern. Grassed pull thru site.  5 star.
Good size sites. Staff were friendly. A nice place to stay. Close to fishing spots. Well priced.
Third time here. Their deluxe cabins are truly great, very spacious and all the facilities you need. Wouldn’t stay anywhere else on the lower Yorke Peninsula
Peaceful, right on the shores, pelicans and swans swimming past!

Great caravan park very neat and tidy. Although park is old it has been kept in very neat and tidy condition. Camp kitchen is modern and immaculate.The staff are very friendly  and helpful There is a dog run and it is just over the road is the beach. To top it off it was very reasonably priced.
Had a great stay. Well looked after park and sites. We'll be back for sure.

Camped here for a night, lovely park, spotless facilities including enclosed camp kitchen for those windy days. Very quiet. Staff were really lovely, would 100% recommend. Beach just the other side of the road!
The Managers are friendly and welcoming and always accommodating. All facilities are clean and well maintained. Recommend this park to everyone
Wonderful place to escape reality 😊

Gem of a caravan park, not far from Edithburgh, Yorktown, Wool Bay or Stansbury. We booked for 14 nights as my husband had to work locally. Caravan park is equipped with everything and has a great kitchen/dining/BBQ area. New caretakers Michelle and Mark were very friendly and helpful.
Nice bomb fire on Saturday was good way to mingle with other nomads.
Powered sites are big, lovely clean and tidy, facilities spotless, Mark and Michelle very friendly hosts and very pet friendly park, would highly recommend for a quiet getaway
Great weekend close to everything I wanted

Quiet
Friendly staff
Cabin comfortable
Price wise fantastic

Great size sites, and well maintained, site fee is a Great relieve from other parks, amenities are spotless, friendly owner managers, if ur into fishing this is the place to kick back enjoy and relax.
Very well maintained great location friendly staff

What a great Caravan Park!! From our first interaction with Steve; received a friendly happy greeting. Which was the whole park Vibe!!
We booked for 4 nights, but stayed 15!!!
The sites where large and green - no need for a mat. The amenities were spotlessly clean.
Beautiful community camp kitchen was really well set up and with well maintained BBQs.
Steve went above and beyond when we asked to extend as it would include the long weekend and the park was pretty well booked out.
Had a great stay and really feel that  Caravan Parks reflect the owners/managers attitude and this one definitely does.............
Friendly, easy, helpful, happy!!!
Makes for an awesome outcome for all.
Will definitely be back.
Thanks guys
The managers Kristy and Steve are awesome and so helpful. The park is kept very neat and tidy with clean amenities.
Great spot in the York Peninsula. Really friendly staff, grassy sight, clean amenities. Easy walk to beach and pub.

A beautifully maintained park. Friendly, helpful staff and so, so peaceful. Close to other wonderful seaside towns and fresh, healthy sea air.
No photos because I was busy relaxing! 😀

Great place to stay lustious green lawns lovely quiet pet freindly getaway kids playground could use a revamp and the kitchen could be a bit larger but apart from these minor hicups I found the management Steve and Kristy very polite and very courteous also very helpful in any possible way they could be I would have no hesitation whatsoever reccomending the Coobowie pk as a great spot to spend a holiday stay thankyou Steve and Kristy for an enjoyable vacation I will definately be back.
Good place for some timeout, amazing beaches

The manager Steve has a thing or two to learn about customer service. We stayed here over Christmas with our 8 week old newborn. It was a 43degree day and our power was shut off. The cabin was a hotbox and the babies breastmilk had gone off in the fridge. Steve was so rude about this and told us not to be dramatic about our babiesmilk and he had no compassion or empathy about the situation. We were left with no help 9pm at night with a screaming 8 week old who we had to drive around for a few hours in the car to keep cool.
Wonderful quiet clean park.  Managers are friendly and helpful.
Just across from the beach and central to a lot of jetties for fishing.  Reasonable rates, friendly staff and well maintained
Great caravan park and really friendly staff
Great park, fantastic caretakers, awesome location definitely the jewel on the yorke peninsula 🙂👍

Such a great place, just spent 5 days ( wish we had longer ) weather unfortunately wasn’t great, but quality bedding, electric blankets, comfy beds, and furniture made it so comfortable.. they have thought of everything, and the cleanliness is 10/10
Lovely park,mangers really nice. Facility’s spotless.

Impeccably clean unit.
Can't get any more beach front than we were.
Highly recommend.
It wos a amazing place

100% recommend, sites easy to park with heaps of room. Variable rates available and the pay for 2, stay for 3 (winter special) rate very good. Manager very friendly and helpful, 10 out of 10 from us..

Firstly it's a great scenic place on the beach. Steve is an awesome bloke to chat with and keeps a very tidy park. With a winter deal makes it very affordable also  was in for 3 days but extended another 3. I will be back
Friendly staff, easily accessible sites, clean ablutions, great camp kitchen, the list goes on. And the winter bonus, outstanding!
Stayed at powered site. Just lovely.  Great hosts. Very clean. Very peaceful
Friendly Staff. And everything great
Friendly service. Very clean cabin

Disappointed. We are frequent patrons of Coobowie Caravan Park and often get the “pet cabin” for my 2kg chihuahua and happily pay the extra cleaning fee for having our pet. We recently stayed for four days and checked out, without incident and leaving the cabin in good condition. Fast forward 5 days and at least 2 other parties occupying the cabin, we received an email and an unauthorised credit card charge of $30 stating that it was a cleaning fee for a dog poo. We called to discuss this and was advised that the cabin had a putrid and rotten smell because of the poo and fish and needed to be deodorised. We did not have any fish at all in the cabin and the cabin did not smell when we vacated. Management continued to state the cabin was putrid because of the dog and fish. We were not heard, when advising this was not us.
Their policy states that if a customer was unhappy with their accommodation then they need to let management know within an hour. I would have thought that if there was an issue with our cabin they would advise us the same day the cleaners cleaned it, or at a very minimum the following day. Not five days later and after other occupants had been in the cabin over Easter.
I also don’t appreciate my credit card being charged without consent.
Flat grassed sites.  Very clean amenities  and very friendly and helpful managers
We had a nice grassed drive through site for our caravan. Nice quiet park staff are friendly and helpful and amenities are very clean.
We stayed in the bunk house very nice clean new fantastic.
Recommended

Great park with spacious grassed sites. Nice and quite even in holidays.Amenities block is spotlessly clean and the grounds well maintained. Close to Innes and a great base for seeing YP. Would recommend.

Probably our third time staying in a powered site here, school holiday time and still everything was great, nice large well looked after grass site.
Steve Kristy do an excellent job, well done guys.
Great mangers Steve and Kirsty ,friendly couple we enjoy our  stay there every time Mark and Teena
Great spot, easy access, wonderful staff and clean amenities. Probably should have gone 5/5.
Pretty standard cabin. Great location, windy though and atmospheric, like being on the edge of the world.
It is my home away from home. Love the location and the people.
A great little park from swags, vans, cabins, semi permanents etc. Well oiled machine by management
Kristy and Steve run a great caravan park and provide amazing service, would thoroughly recommend stopping through on a road trip.

Kristy and Steve were very helpful and friendly,
Spa cabin on foreshore was lovely and clean,will be coming back.
Thank you for very enjoyable weekend.
Mal M.
Had a great stay ,nice roomy grassed  drive threw powered site ,clean amenities, nice and quiet this time of year .friendly approachable management.
